title: Dynamic Dimensions AR Edition
body:
This is a fork of [Dynamic Dimensions](https://github.com/TeamGalacticraft/DynamicDimensions).
The main differences from the original Dynamic Dimensions is 
- use of primary level data
- more diverse biome distribution 
- a critical bugfix to run it on neoforge

github: [https://github.com/dercodeKoenig/DynamicDimensions](https://github.com/dercodeKoenig/DynamicDimensions)
